---
title: "Gym & Pilates"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# Gym & Pilates

A space for balance, discipline, and energy — the routines that help me stay focused and grounded beyond study.

<div class="media-gallery two-col-gallery">
  <img src="images/gym-1.jpg" alt="Gym 1" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(0, gymMedia)">
  <img src="images/gym-2.jpg" alt="Gym 2" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(1, gymMedia)">
  <img src="images/gym-3.jpg" alt="Gym 3" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(2, gymMedia)">
</div>

<script>
const gymMedia = [
  {type: "image", src: "images/gym-1.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/gym-2.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/gym-3.jpg"}
];
</script>

<script src="gallery.js"></script>
